steps.title: Identify the subject
steps.content: The subject of the blank is each one of these plays. The phrase “each one” makes this singular, even though it refers to multiple plays. The relative clause which include Henry V and Richard III modifies the subject but doesn't change its number.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: A verb must agree with its subject in number. Focuses is the only singular form; focus, are focused, and were focused are all plural forms and violate this rule. That matches choice A — A is correct.
